/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/encryptor.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encryptor.dir/FileDiscoverer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encryptor.dir/TaskQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encryptor.dir/CryptoEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encryptor.dir/Worker.cpp.o -o encryptor
